This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] document.caretRangeFromPoint() on an input should return a Range pointing at input with offset 0
  assert_equals: expected Element node <input id="input" value="aaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaaa"></i... but got Element node <body><div id="div">abc</div>\n<div id="shadow"></div>\n\n<c...
Harness: the test ran to completion.
